name: Wuming Chu · Huangshan Hidden Retreat
description:
藏于黄山云谷腹地的隐世精品酒店，由当地百年徽派古宅修缮而成，仅设 28 间客房，环抱在松涛、云海与温泉之间。原木+夯土+青瓦的建筑语言尊重山林本色，每间客房均设私人观山阳台，部分房型直通独立汤池。距黄山云谷索道 5 分钟车程，凌晨可乘酒店专车上山观日出云海。设私厨制安徽山珍宴，茶室提供祁门红茶与黄山毛峰品鉴。

A 28-room boutique hideaway nestled in the cloud-shrouded valleys of Huangshan, restored from a century-old Hui-style courtyard estate. Timber, rammed-earth and dark-tile architecture honours the mountain. Every room opens to a private mountain-view balcony; select rooms have direct access to spring-fed soaking tubs. Five minutes from Yungu cable car; pre-dawn shuttle for sunrise-and-sea-of-clouds tours. Private chef serving foraged Anhui mountain cuisine; tea room features Keemun and Maofeng tastings.
address: 安徽省黄山市黄山风景区云谷寺路侧（毗邻云谷索道下站）

room_types: 汤池院子房 (Spring Pool Courtyard Room)
